untranslatable_reason: Signal requires ranking all stocks by expected returns and selecting top N / bottom N performers in a cross-sectional market-neutral pairs strategy. This requires: (1) access to forward-looking expected returns metric (Rexp) not in allowed indicators, (2) cross-sectional ranking across entire universe rather than single-stock conditions, (3) dynamic N selection logic. The backtest engine schema only supports single-instrument condition evaluation, not portfolio-level ranking and allocation logic.
translation_notes: This is a relative-value, cross-sectional strategy requiring universe ranking and pairs construction. It cannot be expressed as a set of single-stock entry/exit conditions using allowed indicators. Implementation requires a custom portfolio optimizer or ranking module outside the standard condition-based rule engine.
